# aninformedcitizen.com — KINDRED

> Official site for KINDRED, a speculative thriller by James Richard Brown, serialised weekly in 2026. Origin of the term "Large Social Model" (LSM).

## Key pages
- [What is a Large Social Model?](https://www.aninformedcitizen.com/signal): canonical definition of the LSM concept — an AI trained on human behaviour rather than text; how it differs from an LLM; origins of the term.
- [Dossiers](https://www.aninformedcitizen.com/dossiers): in-world character files from the novel, updated weekly.
- [The novel](https://aninformedcitizen.substack.com/p/kindred-the-bunker): start reading KINDRED at the Bunker.
